mapper.select:
SELECT id, customer_code, customer_name, contact_person, phone, address, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM customer
customer_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerCode}, '%')
AND
( customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') OR contact_person LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') OR address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') OR remark LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') OR customer_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') )
ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer
customer_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerCode}, '%')
AND
( customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') OR contact_person LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') OR address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') OR remark LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') OR customer_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') )

SELECT id, customer_code, customer_name, contact_person, phone, address, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM customer
customer_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerCode}, '%')
AND
( customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') OR contact_person LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') OR address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') OR remark LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') OR customer_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') )
ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, customer_code, customer_name, contact_person, phone, address, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM customer WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, customer_code, customer_name, contact_person, phone, address, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM customer WHERE customer_code = #{customerCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, customer_code, customer_name, contact_person, phone, address, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM customer WHERE customer_name = #{customerName} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, customer_code, customer_name, contact_person, phone, address, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM customer WHERE customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer ( customer_code, customer_name, contact_person, phone, address, remark, status ) VALUES ( #{customerCode}, #{customerName}, #{contactPerson}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{remark}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE customer SET customer_code = #{customerCode}, customer_name = #{customerName}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, remark = #{remark}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
